1.en: In this video, we're going to move on to the next major feature inside of MCP servers,

3.zh_cn: 另一个功能。这是我们要加入的。我想让

5.zh_cn: 每当他们这样做时，我想自动取得那个文件的內容並把它

6.zh_cn: 插入到我们发送给 Claude 的提示中。所以整体來说，这个功能大概有

77.en: kind of structure. Now, just so you know, in a real application, something like read a document,

78.en: I would probably return an entire document record. So some kind of dictionary that contains maybe the

81.en: plain text. So in this scenario, my MIME type would be text plain. And then I will make fetch

86.zh_cn: 然后在里面，我要先确保这个人请求的 ID

87.en: actually exists. So if doc ID not in docs, I'm going to raise a value error with a F string that

88.en: says doc with ID not found. And then if we get past that check, I will return docs doc ID.
